sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62398" key="leontiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n62398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a lion</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ λ.</foreign>, in Mithraic mysteries, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.16</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg004:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Antr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
